DEFENDANTS MOTION TO QUASH (TRANSACTION ID # 15124105) FILED BY DEFENDANT GLICK, BRIAN J HEARING SET FOR JUL-13-2015 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BRIAN GLICK'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE IS DENIED. THE CONTRACT INDICATES THAT DEFENDANT ENTERED INTO THE AGREEMENT IN HIS INDIVIDUAL CAPACITY AND DEFENDANT CONSENTED TO CALIFORNIA JURISDICTION BASED ON THE FORUM SELECTION CLAUSE (PAR. 10 OF THE ATTORNEY MEMBERSHIP AGREEMENT). DEFENDANT WAS PROPERLY SERVED AT HIS WORK ADDRESS. THE MAIL SERVICE WAS PROPER PER CCP 415.40 BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS OUT OF THE STATE. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
DECLINED CREDIT CARD PAYMENT UNCOLLECTED - TRANSACTION 15124105 NO FURTHER FILINGS ON PART OF GLICK, BRIAN J

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2016 Off Calendar

Defendants Motion To Quash
Off Calendar Jul-13-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. BRIAN GLICK, ESQ. of Glick Law Firm, Tel No. (561) 391-0448 appearing telephonically for Defendant Brian J. Glick;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Counsel for Defendant did not inform the Court or opposing parties of their intent to present argument regarding the Court's tentative ruling. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BRIAN GLICK'S Motion To Quash Service is denied. The contract indicates that defendant entered into the agreement in his individual capacity and defendant consented to California jurisdiction based on the forum selection clause (par. 10 of the Attorney Membership Agreement). Defendant was properly served at his work address. The mail service was proper per CCP 415.40 because defendant was out of the state. Prevailing party shall submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
